name: Sofia Taylor
description: A gentle-hearted girl who watches over Al by the order of his father. He has been friends with Al since childhood, and they share a relationship close to siblings, often serving to stop Al before his schemes run out of hand. She has an unexpectedly curious and active side to her. While she wishes for Al to win the race, she also wishes for the safety of Al and his friends. (Source: Anime News Network)

name: Sorato Ichimiya
description: Student council president. People around him think of him as a super realist, but he actually loves the occult. When he debuted in high school, he played the role of a clear-headed and cold-hearted character, so now he can't admit that he likes the occult. He recommends Phantom Busters.

name: Stella
description: A girl of unknown origin whom Tama and Aria encounter inside the labyrinth. For some reason, she refers to Tama as the "strong one" and urges him to have her child. She lacks any kind of common sense, and Aria and the others believe she has lost her memory. But her true identity is actually...? (Source: Official Site)
